auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

home.title: Home - Selko
home.allCaughtUpDescription: No events pending review. Check back later for new events from your emails.
home.senderIgnoreInvalidSender: This sender can't be ignored — it isn't an email address.
home.subtitle: A calm place to decide what belongs on your calendar.
home.newSectionDescription: Events to add to your calendar
home.changesSectionDescription: Updates to events already on your calendar
home.syncFailedAfterApprove: Saved, but calendar sync failed. You can retry from History.
home.acceptAllConfirm: Accept all {count} pending items? New events are added to your calendar and changes are applied.

eventSource.sourcePhotoDescription: This event was extracted from a Google Photos image.

history.title: Activity History
history.subtitle: A clear record of what Selko handled for you.
history.noActivityDescription: Events you approve, reject, or sync will appear here.
history.emailReprocessTimeout: Reprocessing is taking longer than expected. You can try again shortly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Keep your accounts, folders, and rules in sync.
settings.targetCalendarHint: Approved events will be added to this calendar
settings.connectCalendarPrompt: Connect Google Calendar to configure calendar defaults.
settings.emailFoldersHint: Included folders are scanned for calendar-relevant messages. Marketing recommendations can be overridden.
settings.noEmailFolders: Folders will appear here after the next email sync.
settings.disconnectDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect {name}? You will need to re-authorize to use it again.

integrations.welcomeDescription: Connect your Google account to get started. Selko will read your emails to find calendar events and sync them to your Google Calendar.
integrations.gmailDescription: Read emails to find calendar events
integrations.outlookDescription: Read Outlook emails to find calendar events
integrations.googleCalendarDescription: Sync approved events to your calendar
integrations.connectFailed: Failed to connect Google account. Please try again.

senderRules.noRules: No automation rules yet. Create rules from the review queue or add one below.
senderRules.deleteRuleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the rule for {label}?

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
